meta.description: Sends daily accomplishment summary email at 6pm EST, or on-demand via webhook

nodes.name: Daily 6pm (Mon-Fri)
nodes.notes: Triggers at 6:00 PM EST on weekdays

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM accomplishments.entries WHERE work_date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY CASE impact_level WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, logged_at DESC

INSERT INTO accomplishments.email_summaries (summary_date, summary_type, email_subject, sent_at, sent_to, status, trigger_type) VALUES (CURRENT_DATE, 'daily', '{{ $('Generate Email HTML').item.json.subject }}', NOW(), ARRAY['mike.jackson@iaml.com'], 'sent', '{{ $input.first().json.trigger || "scheduled" }}')
